DP.153.0000:
I’ve heard about the Victory Road
which leads to the Pokémon League.\f
The word is the road is harsh and
harrowing.\f
I’d better load up on as many items
and medicine as I can carry...
DP.153.0001:
You can buy Seals for decorating
Poké Balls at the Sunyshore Market.\f
Use those Seals in a cool way, and
your Pokémon will be impressed.
